items.title: You Can Play PUBG Duos with the NVIDIA ACE-Powered PUBG Ally AI Teammate for the Next Two Weeks
items.excerpt: Krafton and NVIDIA have opened a limited-time beta letting PUBG players team up in duos with 'PUBG Ally', a co-playable AI teammate powered by NVIDIA ACE and an on-device small language model that talks, finds loot, drives, and fights alongside you.

items.title: See What's New In MetaHuman In Unreal Engine 5.8
items.excerpt: Unreal Engine 5.8's MetaHuman update adds an experimental Collections crowds system and AI-driven markerless motion capture (via Meshcapade) that turns single-camera video into full-body and facial performance, scaling to thousands of characters.

items.title: Tim Sweeney on the future of games, AI, and whether Valve will ever join forces with Epic
items.excerpt: Epic Games CEO Tim Sweeney lays out his view of AI-assisted game development, engine and marketplace competition, and disclosure debates, arguing no single company will end up with an absolute monopoly over the tools shaping games.

items.title: Why game developers don't want to use generative AI
items.excerpt: A feature digging into why many game developers remain reluctant to adopt generative AI in their craft, weighing workflow, authorship, quality, and craft concerns against studio pressure to embrace the tools.

items.title: General Intuition's $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
items.excerpt: General Intuition is building world models and agentic models trained on video-game gameplay data, betting that the action and causality embedded in games can teach AI agents spatial reasoning that transfers from Fortnite-style worlds to robotics and the real world.
